name: Grade 1 Mathematics — Semester 1
description: An 18-week Grade 1 pathway for addition and subtraction within 20, place value to 120, and measurement. Learning builds independence through investigation, guided practice, application, and reflection.
learningGoals: Develop first-grade knowledge and skills in addition and subtraction within 20, place value to 120, and measurement.
Use speaking, drawing, writing, numbers, models, or movement to explain thinking.
Work independently when ready and ask for help, feedback, or clarification when needed.

lessons.title: Explore addition and subtraction within 20, place value to 120, and measurement
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record addition and subtraction within 20, place value to 120, and measurement by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

lessons.title: Practice addition and subtraction within 20, place value to 120, and measurement
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record addition and subtraction within 20, place value to 120, and measurement by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

units.title: Investigate: addition and subtraction within 20, place value to 120, and measurement
units.essentialQuestion: What evidence can we gather about addition and subtraction within 20, place value to 120, and measurement?
outcomes: I can observe, discuss, and record addition and subtraction within 20, place value to 120, and measurement.
I can use accurate words, pictures, numbers, models, writing, or movement to communicate my thinking.

lessons.title: Explore addition and subtraction within 20, place value to 120, and measurement
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record addition and subtraction within 20, place value to 120, and measurement by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

activities.title: Notice and investigate
activities.learnerAction: The learner uses age-appropriate materials and first-grade vocabulary to observe, discuss, and record addition and subtraction within 20, place value to 120, and measurement. Adult supervision is provided whenever the subject involves tools, heat, animals, water, traffic, or online media.

successCriteria: The learner completes a first-grade task connected to addition and subtraction within 20, place value to 120, and measurement.
The learner explains an observation, choice, or strategy with appropriate support.
The learner follows safety, care, and collaboration expectations.
